steps: For this media, following compounds have to be ready-to-use: 2XYT powder 1M K 2 HPO 4 solution 1M KH 2 PO 4 solution

1. Prepare for autoclaving Volumes indicated are sufficient for 1 L of 2XYT medium %s %s 2x YTPG Medium For 400 mL 2xYTP liquid medium add 7.2g D-glucose (Mw 180.16 g/mol), for a final concentrationof 0.1M Mix until glucose is dissolved and filter sterilize (0.22um filter)

Deconstructing Cell-Free Extract Preparation for in Vitro Activation of Transcriptional Genetic Circuitry.. ACS synthetic biology. Rapid and Scalable Preparation of Bacterial Lysates for Cell-Free Gene Expression.. ACS synthetic biology.
creator: Fernando FGC Guzman Chavez
